ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the hospital */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the hospital */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the hospital */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Emergency contact number for the hospital */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds in the hospital */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds in the hospital */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the hospital's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the hospital's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infectors" (
  "infector_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each infector (e.g., patient ID) */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "infector_name" TEXT /* Name of the infector (if known) */,
  "infector_type" TEXT /* Type of the infector (e.g., None, other) */,
  "infection_date" TEXT /* Date when the infector was infected */,
  "infection_location" TEXT /* Location where the infector was infected */,
  "is_patient" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the infector is a patient in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infectors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome (e.g., Recover, None) */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Numerical value indicating the severity of the outcome (e.g., 1 for mild, 5 for severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_categories" (
  "age_cat_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Description of the age range (e.g., 0-4, 5-9) */,
  "age_range_description" TEXT /* More detailed description of the age range (e.g., Infants (0-4 years)) */,
  "age_range_order" INTEGER /* Integer to order the age ranges (e.g., 1 for 0-4, 2 for 5-9) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_symptoms" (
  "case_symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom entry */,
  "case_id" TEXT /* Reference to the case associated with the symptom */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom (e.g., fever, cough) */,
  "symptom_value" TEXT /* Value indicating the presence of the symptom (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "symptom_severity" INTEGER /* Numerical value indicating the severity of the symptom (e.g., 1 for mild, 5 for severe) */,
  "symptom_onset_date" TEXT /* Date when the symptom first appeared */,
  "symptom_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the symptom resolved, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the emergency contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "disease_description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transmission (e.g., airborne, contact) */,
  "incubation_period" TEXT /* Incubation period of the disease */,
  "treatment_guidelines" TEXT /* Treatment guidelines for the disease */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disease record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disease record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epidemiologists" (
  "epidemiologist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the epidemiologist */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the epidemiologist */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the epidemiologist */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the epidemiologist */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the epidemiologist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the epidemiologist record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the epidemiologist record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("epidemiologist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, data analyst, public health official) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
